name: Room Premade Module
author: Habbpy v4
description: Readable user-plugin source reference for the built-in Room module.

surfaces.label: Room Panel
surfaces.summary: Room facts, entry controls, walk/stage click, users, heightmap, item counts, and chat tail.

surfaces.label: Room Overlay
surfaces.summary: Optional room labels and hover hints above the game.

surfaces.label: Room Status
surfaces.summary: Current room summary in the bottom strip.

commands.name: room.readSummary
commands.label: Read Room Summary
commands.description: Read current room mode, id, owner, users, and object counts from Shockless dev state.

commands.name: room.showHotelView
commands.label: Show Hotel View
commands.description: Leave the current room through Shockless helpers and return to hotel view.

commands.name: room.enterPrivate
commands.label: Enter Private Room
commands.description: Enter a private flat through the generated Navigator Component prepare-room-entry path.

commands.name: room.enterPublic
commands.label: Enter Public Room
commands.description: Enter a public room through the generated Navigator public node prepare-room-entry path.

commands.name: room.openNavigator
commands.label: Open Navigator
commands.description: Open the Navigator window through Shockless helpers.

commands.name: room.stageClick
commands.label: Walk / Stage Click
commands.description: Click the live Shockless stage through Director pointer events for mapped walk/click tests.
